title: A Country Torn Apart
description: On pages 14–16, this part focuses on a country torn apart within the The Guardians of Zou storyline.
scene: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Prepare to host the friends of our Saviors!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Whoa! What's all this!? Everyone's giving off really good vibes!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Wait a sec... shouldn't they be attacking us and preparing to have us as a meal?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Aren't you guys a human-hating species?

dialogue.speaker: Minks
dialogue.text: Species? I guess some- one who's never seen other minks would think that way, but...

dialogue.speaker: Minks
dialogue.text: You all are just hairless monkey minks. Different variety of the same species. If we're gonna hate you, it'll be because of who you are, not what you are.

dialogue.speaker: Minks
dialogue.text: The fur that covers our bodies, called Mink, is the pride of our race, but there are quite a few of us...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: That find your lesser milk, hairless bodies quite beautiful.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Oh! Look! It's chopper and Nami!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Gyaah! They've got me! Let me through!

dialogue.speaker: Wanda
dialogue.text: Yes, yes, thank you! Garchu! Garchu!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: They're the exact opposite of what I had imagined!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Whoo! I'm glad to see you guys!

dialogue.speaker: Pudding
dialogue.text: Are Sanji and Brook and Momo okay too!?

summary: A Country Torn Apart: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.
